title: Bolsius - Fragrance Tealights - Fresh Cotton - Pack of 18 - Long Burning Time of 4 Hours - Household Candle - Interior Decoration - Natural Extracts - Includes Natural Vegan Wax - No Palm Oil
features: What you see is what you smell! Discover the clean scent of freshly laundered cotton sheets and enjoy a pure fragrance experience in your home. BOLSIUS Fresh Cotton tea lights burn up to four hours. Made with love for people and planet, they consist of natural extracts and vegan wax but contain no palm oil.
With natural extracts With natural vegan wax Without palm oil Without animal fat Perfect flame for up to ± 4 hours Pure fragrance experience
The pure freshness of white cotton blossom is what gives Fresh Cotton its crisp, clean scent. It will remind you of freshly laundered cotton sheets hung outdoors to dry in the fresh air.

Choose your favourite fragrance from Bolsius's collection. It combines iconic fragrances with natural extracts. Made with love for people and planet. With natural vegan wax and zero palm oil or animal fat. Experience the pure fragrance experience of these trendy fragrances and modern classics within the comfort of your own home!
